resourceTemplates.name: entity-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search entities
resourceTemplates.description: Searches for public entities such as people, organizations, or topics. Results include name, ranking, topic, country and profile image. Use `query` for the search term, optionally filter by `alpha_2` country code (au, ca, de, es, fr, gb, nl, us) and control result size with `limit`.

resourceTemplates.name: entity-detail
resourceTemplates.title: Get entity detail
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed information about a specific entity including biography, country, topics and social media accounts such as X, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok and YouTube.

resourceTemplates.name: entity-match-x-handle
resourceTemplates.title: Match entity by X handle
resourceTemplates.description: Matches an entity based on its X (Twitter) handle. Useful for resolving a social media account like `@username` to the corresponding entity profile in Amygdala.

resourceTemplates.name: entity-peers-by-x-handle
resourceTemplates.title: Get peers by X handle
resourceTemplates.description: Returns peer entities related to the given X (Twitter) handle. Useful for discovering similar or related public figures, brands or organizations.
